title: Sierra Acquires Agent Startup ‘Takeoff’ to Diversify Its Business
summary: Sierra , the AI customer support startup Taylor now leads, is acquiring Thumaty’s three-person startup, Takeoff , which develops agents that can work on tasks for long periods of time, the companies told The Information exclusively.
